ability: 在你的首个夜晚，你要选择一个方向：每个白天，该方向上的下一名存活的镇民玩家不会死于处决。
firstNightReminder:
The Captain America points clockwise or anti-clockwise. Mark the Captain America with that direction.

Mark the next living Townsfolk in the chosen direction 'Shielded'.
otherNightReminder: Mark the next living Townsfolk in the chosen direction 'Shielded'.
flavor: I can do this all day.
